zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Curwen II Knt.於大約1459年出生在英國波藍德沃爾金頓時，他的父親Sir Christopher II Curwen38歲，母親Anne Pennington31歲。他於大約1477年與Anne Huddleston結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1522年2月8日在他的家鄉享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Curwen II Knt.于大约1459年出生在英国波藍德沃爾金頓时，他的父亲Sir Christopher II Curwen38岁，母亲Anne Pennington31岁。他于大约1477年与Anne Huddleston结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1522年2月8日在他的家乡享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Curwen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place called Culewen (now Colvend) in Kirkcudbrightshire. The family was early established in Lancashire, where it was often pronounced without the -w-; see Corrin and Currin .

variants.name: Corrin
meanings: Irish and Manx: shortened form of Mac Torin, from Gaelic mac ‘son (of)’ + Old Norse Thórfinnr (from Thórr, the name of the Scandinavian thunder god, + the ethnic designation Finnr). Compare Turpin . This name has occasionally been confused with Corin .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Japanese: written 井伊 ‘well’ and ‘that’, the name one of Japan's great daimyō families, originally based in Tōtōmi (now part of Shizuoka prefecture), later in Kōzuke (now Gunma prefecture) and Ōmi (now Shiga prefecture). Other variants of the name substitute either character with similar sounding characters such as 飯 ‘cooked rice’, 居 ‘residence’, and so forth. It was formerly Romanized as Iyi. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Roman number II (meaning ‘the second’, i.e. ‘the younger’ of the two bearers of the name) is apparently also counted as a surname Ii.

History: Ii Naomasa (1561–1602) was awarded lands in Kōzuke and Ōmi for his service in the civil wars that won the shōgunate (military dictatorship) for Tokugawa Ieyasu. His family built the beautiful castle of Hikone, which still stands. His descendant Ii Naosuke (1815–1860) ruled Japan for two years as Tairō (Great Elder) and played a major part in signing treaties that opened Japan to foreign trade at the end of the Tokugawa Shōgunate. He was assassinated by adherents of the anti-foreign party.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Curwen II Knt. was born about 1459, in Workington, Cumberland, England, his father, Sir Christopher II Curwen, was 38 and his mother, Anne Pennington, was 31. He married Anne Huddleston about 1477. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 8 February 1522, in his hometown, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Curwen II Knt. est né environ 1459, à Workington, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Christopher II Curwen, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Anne Pennington, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Anne Huddleston environ 1477. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 8 février 1522, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Curwen II Knt. um 1459 in Workington, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Christopher II Curwen 38 und seine Mutter Anne Pennington 31. Er hat um 1477 Anne Huddleston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Februar 1522 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Curwen II Knt. è nato il circa 1459 nel Workington, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Sir Christopher II Curwen, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Anne Pennington, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Anne Huddleston circa 1477. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 8 febbraio 1522, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.Workington, Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランドウオルキントン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Curwen II Knt.が約1459年にイギリスクウンバーランドウオルキントンで生まれた時，父Sir Christopher II Curwenは38歳，母Anne Penningtonは31歳であった。約1477年にAnne Huddlestonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1522年2月8日に故郷で64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Curwen II Knt.(이)가 대략 1459년 영국 쿠벌랜드 워킨그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Christopher II Curwen(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Pennington(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1477년 Anne Huddleston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1522년 2월 8일 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Curwen II Knt. nasceu aproximadamente 1459, em Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Christopher II Curwen, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Anne Pennington, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Huddleston aproximadamente 1477. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1522, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Curwen II Knt. родился около 1459 г. в местности воркингтон, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Christopher II Curwen было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Pennington, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Huddleston около 1477 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 8 февраля 1522 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Curwen II Knt. nació aproximadamente 1459, en Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Christopher II Curwen, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Anne Pennington, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Anne Huddleston aproximadamente 1477. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de febrero de 1522, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años.
